title: Nautilius Armour Recipe
description: Now craft your own Nautilius Armour
body:
🌊 **Nautilus Armour Recipe Datapack *Ocean’s Legacy Edition***  
Harness the depths—no drowned loot required!  
This datapack introduces a full set of **Nautilus Armour**, forged from the strongest ingots across progression tiers, giving players a new oceanic-themed equipment path.

✨ **Features**  
✅ Shaped recipes using **8 ingots** of the chosen material (Copper, Gold, Iron, Diamond, Netherite)  
✅ Each recipe yields the corresponding **Nautilus Armour** 
✅ Balanced integration with vanilla progression (Copper → Gold → Iron → Diamond → Netherite)  
✅ Lore tooltip: *“Forged in the tides, blessed by the spiral.”*  
🧩 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11+
